pois.name: College Fjord Scenic Cruising Area
pois.notes: 26 named glaciers in a single passage through Prince William Sound. Ships transit slowly.

pois.name: Harvard Glacier
pois.notes: Star attraction: 1.5 miles wide, 300+ feet tall. One of few advancing glaciers. Frequent calving.

pois.name: Yale Glacier
pois.notes: Tidewater glacier adjacent to Harvard. Retreating but still impressive.

pois.name: Smith Glacier
pois.notes: Hanging glacier on the southeast wall of College Fjord. Named for Smith College.

pois.name: Bryn Mawr Glacier
pois.notes: Tidewater glacier on the southeast side. Named for Bryn Mawr College.

pois.name: Wellesley Glacier
pois.notes: Hanging glacier visible from the port side during approach.

pois.name: Vassar Glacier
pois.notes: One of several smaller college-named glaciers along the fjord's southeast wall.

pois.name: Barry Arm
pois.notes: Adjacent arm of Harriman Fjord with Barry Glacier. Some ships transit here as well.

pois.name: Wildlife Viewing Areas
pois.notes: Sea otters, harbor seals on ice floes, bald eagles, Dall porpoises, and seabirds.

pois.name: Harriman Fjord
pois.notes: Adjacent fjord named for the 1899 Harriman Expedition. Additional glaciers and scenery.
